positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a whimsical forest creature, such as a fox or small deer, sitting amidst abstract geometric patterns and stylized flora. The style should be modern, flat vector graphic art with strong, clean lines and solid color blocks. Use a restricted, harmonious color palette of deep indigo, forest green, warm cream, and burnt orange. The composition should feature a central, easily discernible silhouette with excellent contrast against a slightly lighter background wash. High level of detail in the nature elements, suitable for repeat pattern printing. Whimsical, sophisticated, clean design, suitable for apparel print.
negative: realistic photo, blurry, noisy, artifact, watermark, text, logo, signature, dirty, monochrome, low contrast, extra limbs, deformed, abstract mess
